title: ziziphora subnivalis
intro: Ziziphora subnivalis, also known as alpine dragon's head or alpine ziziphora, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. The medicinal properties of Ziziphora subnivalis have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and digestive issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving headaches, and acting as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, Ziziphora subnivalis is often used in teas, infusions, and ointments, and its essential oil is also utilized for its medicinal and aromatic properties.
